name: ai-platform
description: AI Platform power pack — prompt validation, retrieval checks, model safety, and RAG pipeline analysis
rules: Validate prompt templates for injection risks
Check retrieval pipeline for completeness (embedding → search → rerank → context)
Verify model configuration safety (temperature, max_tokens, stop sequences)
Detect hardcoded API keys or model endpoints
Validate error handling around LLM API calls
Check for proper token counting and context window management
Review guardrail implementation for model outputs

checks.description: Detect potential prompt injection vulnerabilities in prompt templates
Detect hardcoded API keys for AI services
Check for LLM API calls without proper error handling
Verify token counting before API calls to prevent context overflow
Validate RAG pipeline completeness (embed, search, rerank, generate)
